docs.text: For full documentation visit mkdocs.org . Commands mkdocs new [dir-name] - Create a new project. mkdocs serve - Start the live-reloading docs server. mkdocs build - Build the documentation site. mkdocs -h - Print help message and exit. Project layout mkdocs.yml # The configuration file. docs/ index.md # The documentation homepage. ... # Other markdown pages, images and other files.
docs.title: Home

docs.text: Status contains texture files for DMC1 HUD elements: act_img.itm : Images for actions (Dante's moveset) inputs [Action Menu] act_init.dat : Actions UI texts (e.g.: Stinger-Level 1, Normal, Alastor) [Action Menu] air.ip2 : Alastor's background effect frames [Action Menu] cockpit2.t32 : Red orbs font numbers & boss health bar [HUD] cockpit.t32 : Dante's health bar, DT runes, red orbs & rank textures [HUD] dh_rank.itm : D to S mission rating textures [Mission End Screen] dnt_mgc.itm : Dante's melee weapon background texture [Weapon Screen] dnt_wpn.itm : Dante's ranged weapon background texture [Weapon Screen] file_img.itm : Enemies' file textures [File Screen] fle_init.dat : Enemies' file name textures [File Screen] fontnew.tm2 : A few font textures ("Devil Arms", "Nightmare-B", "Force Edge", "Ifrit", "Grenadegun") [Weapon Screen] item_big.itm : Every key item, consumables, orbs + some unused images [Items Screen] item_st1.dat : Item name textures [Items Screen] item_st2.dat : Other item name textures + items texture atlas [Items Screen] item_st3.dat : Other item name textures + items texture atlas [Items Screen] item_tm2.itm : Some item textures and their names [Items Screen] itm001.ip2 : Bangle of Time equip animation frames [Items Screen] itm002.ip2 : Luminite animation frames [Items Screen] itm307.ip2 : Perfect Amulet combining animation frames [Items Screen] itm_tm2.itm : Some item textures and their names [Items Screen] last.ip2 : Sparda's background effect frames [Pause Screen] moya9.ip2 : Smoke's background effect frames [Pause Screen] mssn_clr.bnd : Mission clear screen font textures ("SAVE", "next mission", "Ranking Bonus"...) [Mission End Screen] mssn_clr.dat : Similar to the previous one [Mission End Screen] mssn_f00.tm2 : Mission start screen font textures ("mission start", "power up") [Mission Start Screen] mssn_img.itm : Mission end background images & mission/secret mission start images [Mission Start Screen] [Mission End Screen] note: contains an unused & unfinished image for "mission 24", flying the biplane mssn_ini.bnd : Again, mission start screen font textures ("mission start", "power up") [Mission Start Screen] mssn_ips_00.ip2 : Normal Mission Clear text animation frames [Mission End Screen] mssn_ips_01.ip2 : Alastor Mission Clear text animation frames [Mission End Screen] mssn_ips_02.ip2 : Ifrit Mission Clear text animation frames [Mission End Screen] mssn_ips_03.ip2 : Sparda Mission Clear text animation frames [Mission End Screen] mssn_ips_04.ip2 .. mssn_ips_15.ip2 : Ifrit Mission Clear text animation frames copies [Mission End Screen] mssn_ips_16.ip2 : Mission 1 start screen animation frames [Mission Start Screen] mssn_ips_17.ip2 : Mission 2 start screen animation frames [Mission Start Screen] mssn_ips_18.ip2 : Mission 3 start screen animation frames [Mission Start
